overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence showing a character riding a horse through a Mediterranean coastal landscape at sunset. The journey progresses from a cliffside stone wall path through rocky inland terrain to a salt flat basin with traditional windmills and stone warehouses.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside path with stone retaining wall

events.description: moving from coastal cliffside into inland rocky terrain, leaving the stone tower behind

agents.ego_description: trotting along a coastal dirt path beside a stone wall with the sea visible to the right

entered.detail: weathered stone wall lining the right side of the coastal path
tall rectangular stone tower with small windows overlooking the coast
calm Mediterranean sea visible beyond the stone wall
wooden construction scaffolding near the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow coastal path bordered by a stone wall on the right and cliffs on the left. The character rides a horse along the dirt trail as the sun sets over the water, passing a prominent stone watchtower while heading inland away from the coast.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky hillside trail with scattered cypress trees and stone outcrops

events.description: crossing a small stone bridge over a dry stream bed
approaching farm settlement with red-roofed buildings and wooden fences

agents.ego_description: cantering through rocky terrain with tall cypress trees and passing over a stone bridge

entered.detail: low stone bridge crossing a dry ravine
tall narrow evergreen trees lining the trail
rustic building with terracotta roof tiles
ancient stone wall remains beside the path

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to open rocky hills with scattered cypress trees. The character crosses a stone bridge and approaches a farm settlement, with the coastal elements receding from view as the terrain becomes more inland and arid.

scene_state.functional_zone: salt flat basin with evaporation pools and traditional windmills

events.description: entering the salt flat area with white salt piles and wooden fences lining the path
slowing to a walk while approaching the windmill structure

agents.ego_description: riding along the edge of salt evaporation pools with the setting sun reflecting off the water

entered.detail: shallow rectangular pools of water used for salt harvesting
mounds of harvested white salt gleaming in the sunset
weathered wooden posts and rails separating the path from the salt flats
white stone windmill with wooden blades and conical roof

segments.scene_description: The landscape opens into a wide salt flat basin with evaporation pools reflecting the golden sunset. The character rides past white salt piles and wooden fences, approaching a traditional windmill that dominates the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: windmill plaza with stone warehouses and salt processing equipment

events.description: entering the windmill plaza with stone buildings and workers visible
turning right around the windmill and continuing along the salt flats

agents.ego_description: riding past the windmill and through the settlement area, observing workers near the salt processing buildings

notable_agents.action: workers standing near the windmill base and wooden carts

entered.detail: large stone building with small windows adjacent to the windmill
rustic wooden wagons parked near the warehouse entrance

segments.scene_description: The character rides into the windmill plaza where stone warehouses and wooden carts mark a small processing settlement. Workers stand near the structures as the horse passes the windmill and turns to follow the salt flats, which now appear on the left as the journey continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a narrow coastal cliffside into a wide, industrial salt flat basin under a setting sun. It begins on a dirt trail bordered by a stone wall and a watchtower, moving away from the coast as the character rides inland. As the terrain shifts, the scene opens into rocky hills with scattered cypress trees and a stone bridge that leads toward a remote farm settlement. The landscape then expands into a vast basin of reflective evaporation pools and white salt piles, with the lighting turning a deep golden hue as a traditional windmill emerges on the horizon. Finally, the camera glides into a processing plaza filled with stone warehouses and wooden carts before turning to follow the salt flats as they stretch out to the left.
